comments.phase4_issues: Process one issue per batch for Ruling extraction. Allows AI to deduplicate rulings across issues.
comments.phase5_rulings: Process one ruling per batch for Argument extraction. Allows AI to deduplicate arguments across rulings.
comments.phase7_arguments: Batch size for assigning Doctrine/Policy/FactPattern concepts to Arguments. Set to 3 to process arguments in small batches. New concepts created in each batch are appended to catalogs before the next batch, ensuring de-duplication across batches.
